name: pi-context-bridge-vscode
description: Share live VS Code editor context with Pi coding agent sessions in any local terminal.

commands.title: Pi Context Bridge: Toggle Selection Sharing
Pi Context Bridge: Copy Installation Instructions

piContextBridge.enabled.description: Expose local editor context to authenticated Pi Context Bridge clients.

piContextBridge.shareSelectionText.description: Include selected text in context snapshots. File and range metadata remain available when disabled.

piContextBridge.maxSelectionChars.description: Maximum selected characters returned in a context snapshot.

scripts.package: corepack pnpm build && vsce package --no-dependencies --out pi-context-bridge.vsix
